/// @generated
// This file is auto-generated. Do not edit manually.
// Structure: BinarySearch
#include <array>
#include <cstring>
#include <cstdint>
#include <limits>
#include <string_view>


class fastdata final {


    static constexpr std::array<float, 5> keys = {
        std::numeric_limits<float>::lowest(), -1.0f, 0.0f, 1.0f, std::numeric_limits<float>::max()
    };

public:
    [[nodiscard]]
    static constexpr bool contains(const float key) noexcept {

        size_t lo = 0;
        size_t hi = 5;
        while (lo < hi) {
            const size_t mid = lo + ((hi - lo) >> 1);
            const float mid_key = keys[mid];
            const int32_t order = mid_key < key ? -1 : (mid_key > key ? 1 : 0);

            if (order == 0)
                return true;
            if (order < 0)
                lo = mid + 1;
            else
                hi = mid;
        }

        return false;
    }

    static constexpr size_t item_count = 5;
    static constexpr float min_key = std::numeric_limits<float>::lowest();
    static constexpr float max_key = std::numeric_limits<float>::max();
};
